items.productName: Women’s Corset Jumpsuit - High-Waisted Wide Leg One-Piece Bodice Suit

orders.address: Bandra West Apt 4B, Linking Road, Mumbai, MH, 400050

bookings.notes: Need shade matching help for Classic Clip-ins.

reviews.title: Absolutely gorgeous fit!
reviews.text: I wore this Corset Jumpsuit for an evening event, and the compliments did not stop. The velvet fabric feels so premium, and the metallic print looks stunning in lighting. Fits perfectly and is very comfortable.

reviews.productName: Girls' Fairy-Style High-Low Gown in Blush Pink
reviews.title: Perfect birthday gown!
reviews.text: Ordered this for my daughter's 4th birthday party. She looked absolutely magical! The organza layers have a beautiful natural sheen and the high-low train is gorgeous. Highly recommend SAMM Renaissance for kids wear.

reviews.productName: Trendy Attractive Women Hot Pink Co-ord Set
reviews.title: So comfortable and chic
reviews.text: The neon hot pink is incredibly vibrant and beautiful. The fabric is very comfortable for daily outings but looks polished enough for party wear. Got the size M and it fits like a glove.

reviews.title: Very trendy waistcoat
reviews.text: Great waistcoat, very stylish. Pair it with trousers for a professional look or jeans for a casual dinner. I got the Black color and it fits very nicely.

blogs.title: How to Style Velvet Corset Jumpsuits for Evening Glam
blogs.author: Elena Rostova
blogs.summary: Discover the ultimate masterclass on styling corset jumpsuits with bold accessories, chic layering, and statement footwear.
blogs.content: Velvet jumpsuits represent the pinnacle of evening luxury. Pairing them with gold accessories, structural blazers, and high stiletto heels elevates the silhouette to lookbook perfection...

blogs.title: Why Co-ord Sets Are Taking Over Women's Travel Wardrobes
blogs.author: Shristi Mehta
blogs.summary: Coordinated sets combine effortless ease with immediate style. Read why stylists call them the travel wardrobe essential.
blogs.content: The magic of co-ord sets lies in their instant coordination. When flying or exploring new cities, wearing a matching top-and-bottom set offers high comfort while maintaining a put-together, tailored look...

blogs.title: Choosing Kids Party Gowns: Fabric Sizing & Sensation Guide
blogs.author: Mira Kapoor
blogs.summary: A practical guide to choosing comfortable, breathable organza and tulle party wear for toddlers without compromising on volume.
blogs.content: Kids' skin is highly sensitive. When selecting fairy-style dresses, always ensure there is a 100% breathable satin or cotton inner lining to prevent netting scratches, and allow flexible movements...

settings.heroTitle:
Unveil Your Elegance.
Exquisite Custom Wear.
settings.heroSubtitle: Exquisite corset jumpsuits, kids fairy-style gowns, co-ords, and luxury accessories designed to make every occasion a fairytale.
settings.influencer1Text: We styled Sanya for the Filmfare Red Carpet using our Corset Jumpsuit. The structured bodice matches natural contours flawlessly.
settings.influencer2Text: Our co-ord sets are Sanya's go-to for smart travel luxury. Very comfortable yet tailored.
